title: What Claude Code Chooses
summary: Analysis of Claude Code's decision-making patterns when assisting with coding tasks. AI coding assistant behavior analysis has moderate technical depth but may be more observational than deeply technical.

title: Launch HN: Cardboard (YC W26) – Agentic video editor
summary: YC W26 startup launching an AI-powered video editor. Product announcement with demo focus rather than deep technical implementation details. Startup coverage has limited translation value.

title: Hydroph0bia – fixed SecureBoot bypass for UEFI firmware from Insyde H2O
summary: Security research writeup on UEFI SecureBoot vulnerability in Insyde firmware. Deep technical content covering firmware exploitation, secure boot bypass techniques. High translation value for security researchers.

title: What does 2>&1 mean?
summary: Basic shell redirection explanation (stderr to stdout). Fundamental Linux concept already well-documented in Chinese. Too basic for translation effort.

title: OsmAnd's Faster Offline Navigation
summary: Technical deep-dive into routing algorithm optimizations for offline map navigation. Covers graph algorithms, performance improvements. Good technical depth with practical mobile dev relevance.
